3270230.name: Manual
3270230.description: This game centers around a colorfully randomized ball which players must navigate along a winding path. The visuals are vibrant and lively, with scenery changing as the ball rolls, offering a feast for the eyes. The road, however, is not always smooth, featuring various obstacles. When the ball encounters a barrier matching its own color, it can pass through; encountering a mismatched color results in the end of the game. The cheerful background music blends with the rolling sounds of the ball, creating a relaxing yet slightly tense atmosphere that keeps players engaged.
